org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.property

Class NameUndo

  • java.lang.Object
    • javax.swing.undo.AbstractUndoableEdit
      • org.arakhne.afc.ui.swing.undo.AbstractCallableUndoableEdit
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.property.NameUndo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, UndoableEdit, Undoable

     class NameUndo
extends AbstractCallableUndoableEdit
    Undo action for names of figures.
